title: VoIP call quality: 9 ways to improve quality issues
snippet: These tips help improve your VoIP phone calls and prevent the stuttering, echoes, or missing words that can make VoIP conversations a hair-tearing experience.

title: VoIP Call Quality: Best Practices To Monitor & Improve It
snippet: 1. Optimize your internet connection ... Make sure your internet bandwidth can fully support voice traffic without congestion or quality issues.

title: How to Optimize Your VoIP Cloud Phone System

title: Optimizing VoIP Call Quality
snippet: The industry standard is the Mean Opinion Score (MOS).MOS is a numerical measure of the perceived quality of voice calls, ranging from 1 (bad) to 5 (excellent).
